basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Post Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemistry, Material Science, Polymer science, or allied fields, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from graduation onwards, Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Ph.D. degree in Chemistry, Material Science, Polymer science, or allied fields from recognized institutions/universities. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from graduation onwards. Minimum 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Post Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree in Chemistry, Material Science, Polymer science, or allied fields, with minimum 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th grades.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Post Doctoral Fellow position ranges from Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 84,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Gandhinagar Post Doctoral Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an application review followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IP/10257/Advt0212.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Post Doctoral Fellow position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
